policy: Same-crop unsupported strawberry fruit candidates are auxiliary OE training inputs, not final OOD evidence.

placements.short_rationale: Bugwood describes Phomopsis leaf blight and fruit rot on strawberry; unsupported by current strawberry fruit labels, so it is OE rather than final OOD evidence.
placements.notes: Bugwood describes Phomopsis leaf blight and fruit rot on strawberry; unsupported by current strawberry fruit labels, so it is OE rather than final OOD evidence.
